title: Semi's Backpacks
body:
![backpacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6c5616e8e8aeb5cf951daa10d43e0736c18d78c.png)

**For me all of the popular backpack mods are bit too overpowered for my taste with all the extra stuff and massive storages they add. Like seriously i dont want my backpack to act like totem of undying when im about to die ? idk maybe it's just me. But here i am with 4 backpacks and only backpacks.**

 

My initial thought while making the crafting recipes harder and time consuming was that the backpacks should be items that are desireable from the early game to the endgame, and not a single backpack that you will craft once and never think about it again. I hope i didnt made them too demanding ? But I'm sure you'll like it if you were looking for such a mod...

 

 

_This was a mod for our modded smp. And i decided to make it public._

_English and Turkish Translation are available._

I found the original leather backpack texture from pinterest, the other recolors are by me
Link: https://www.redbubble.com/i/poster/Pixel-Backpack-by-BenHenry/33418429.LVTDI

 

_#3/3_
